# FlowBoard Billing FAQ

## Billing Frequently Asked Questions

### What payment methods do you accept?

FlowBoard accepts all major credit cards: Visa, Mastercard, American Express, and Discover. We also accept ACH bank transfers for annual plans. Enterprise customers have the option to pay via invoice with net 30 payment terms. All payments are processed securely through Stripe - we never store your credit card information on our servers.

For international customers, we accept credit cards issued in any country. Payments are processed in USD, and your bank will handle currency conversion at their standard exchange rates.

### When am I charged?

For monthly plans, you're charged on the same day each month that you signed up. If you signed up on January 15th, you'll be charged on the 15th of each subsequent month. For months with fewer than 31 days, charges occur on the last day of the month if your signup date was the 29th, 30th, or 31st.

Annual plans are charged upfront for the full year. You'll receive a renewal reminder email 30 days before your annual renewal date.

### How do I get invoices?

Invoices are automatically emailed to your billing email address within 24 hours of each payment. You can also download past invoices anytime from Settings > Billing > Invoice History. Invoices include your company name, tax ID (if provided), and detailed line items.

Enterprise customers can customize invoice details including purchase order numbers, custom billing addresses, and additional recipient email addresses for accounts payable departments.

### What is your refund policy?

**Pro plans:** We offer a 30-day satisfaction guarantee. If you're not happy with FlowBoard for any reason, cancel within 30 days of your first payment and we'll issue a full refund, no questions asked. After 30 days, we don't provide refunds, but you can cancel anytime and won't be charged for the next billing period.

**Enterprise plans:** Enterprise contracts are non-refundable due to the custom onboarding, training, and dedicated resources allocated. However, if you're experiencing issues, contact your Customer Success Manager - we'll work with you to address concerns or adjust your plan if needed.

**Unused credits:** If you cancel mid-month, we don't prorate or refund the current month. Your workspace remains active until the end of your billing period.

### How do I upgrade or downgrade my plan?

**Upgrading:** Go to Settings > Billing > Change Plan and select your new tier. For monthly to monthly upgrades (Free → Pro or Pro → Enterprise), you're charged the prorated difference immediately, and your billing date doesn't change. For monthly to annual upgrades, you're charged the annual rate minus a credit for unused time on your monthly plan.

**Downgrading:** Downgrades take effect at the end of your current billing period. If you downgrade from Pro to Free on February 10th and your billing renews on February 20th, you'll have Pro features until February 20th, then drop to Free.

**Important:** Downgrading from Pro to Free while exceeding Free limits (>5 users, >3 projects) requires you to remove excess users or archive projects before the downgrade completes. We'll email you 7 days before with instructions.

### Can I cancel anytime?

Yes. FlowBoard has no long-term contracts for Free or Pro plans. Cancel anytime from Settings > Billing > Cancel Subscription. Your workspace remains active until the end of your paid period, then converts to Free (if you're within Free tier limits) or becomes read-only (if you exceed Free limits).

Enterprise plans have a minimum 1-year commitment. Early cancellation incurs a termination fee equal to 50% of remaining contract value. Contact your CSM to discuss alternatives like plan adjustments or payment plans.

### What happens to my data if I cancel?

Your data remains accessible:

- **If you stay within Free limits:** Your workspace continues on the Free plan indefinitely
- **If you exceed Free limits:** Your workspace becomes read-only for 90 days. You can still export data, but can't create or edit tasks. After 90 days, workspaces are archived and accessible only via support request.

**We never delete your data without explicit confirmation.** To request permanent deletion, contact support@flowboard.io with your workspace ID. Deletion is permanent and irreversible after 7 days.

### How does billing work when I add or remove users?

**Adding users:** Pro and Enterprise plans bill per user. When you add users mid-cycle, you're charged a prorated amount immediately. For example, if you add 3 users halfway through your monthly billing period, you're charged for 3 users × ($12/month ÷ 2) = $18.

**Removing users:** When you remove users, the credit is applied to your next invoice. If you remove 2 users halfway through the month, your next invoice is reduced by $12 (2 users × $6 prorated refund).

**Billing members vs guests:** Only Admins and Members count toward your user limit. Guests have read-only access and don't count as billable users - invite as many as you need at no extra cost.

### Can I switch between monthly and annual billing?

Yes. You can upgrade from monthly to annual anytime. The remaining balance from your monthly plan credits toward your annual payment. For example, if you have 15 days left on your monthly plan, that's worth ~$6/user, which reduces your first annual payment.

Downgrading from annual to monthly takes effect at your annual renewal date. You'll keep your annual plan benefits until then, then switch to monthly billing.

### Do you offer discounts for nonprofits or education?

Yes! FlowBoard offers 40% off Pro or Enterprise plans for qualified organizations:

**Nonprofits:** Must be a registered 501(c)(3) organization (US) or equivalent in your country. Provide proof of nonprofit status (IRS determination letter or charity registration number).

**Educational institutions:** Must be an accredited school, college, or university. Verification is automatic for email addresses ending in .edu. For non-.edu institutions, provide proof of accreditation.

**Application process:** Email sales@flowboard.io with subject "Nonprofit/Education Discount Request" and attach documentation. We typically respond within 2 business days. Discounts apply to new and existing customers.

### What happens if I exceed my Free plan limits?

**User limit (5 users):** When you try to invite a 6th user, you'll be prompted to upgrade to Pro. Existing users remain active, but you can't add new ones until you upgrade or remove someone.

**Project limit (3 projects):** When you try to create a 4th project, you'll see an upgrade prompt. Archive old projects or upgrade to Pro for unlimited projects.

**Storage limit (5 GB):** When you hit 5 GB, file uploads will fail. Delete old attachments or upgrade to Pro (100 GB per user).

Your workspace remains functional - you just can't exceed the limits without upgrading. We'll email you when you reach 80% of any limit.

### How do I change my billing email or credit card?

Go to Settings > Billing > Payment Method. Click "Update Card" to enter new credit card details. To change your billing email, click "Billing Contact" and enter the new email address. Changes take effect immediately and apply to future invoices.

For security, we require you to confirm the update via email sent to both the old and new billing addresses (for email changes) or via 2FA if enabled on your account.

### What taxes or fees are added to my bill?

**US customers:** We collect sales tax for customers in states where we have nexus. Your invoice shows the tax rate and amount separately. Tax rates vary by state (typically 5-10%).

**International customers:** We don't collect VAT or other international taxes - you're responsible for self-assessing based on your local tax laws. For EU customers, provide your VAT ID in Settings > Billing to have VAT charges reverse-charged.

**No hidden fees:** The prices on our pricing page are what you pay (plus applicable taxes). No setup fees, no per-project charges, no surprise overages.
